title: hieracium krasanii subsp. krasanii
intro: Hieracium krasanii subsp. krasanii, also known as Krasanii Hawkweed, is a rare and lesser-known species of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe, for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds, due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. In herbal preparations, Hieracium krasanii subsp. krasanii is often used as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
